_comment: UNRESTRICTED maintainer bundle (v3.16.0). PRIVILEGED: bypasses RLS, can DELETE/DDL on every profile. Build: python scripts/package_skill.py v3.16.0 --person config/pc_unrestricted.config.example.json --unrestricted --out healthspan-PC-MAINTAINER-UNRESTRICTED-v3.16.0.skill
_secret_note: db_url is read AT BUILD TIME from config/pc_unrestricted.secret.txt (gitignored). Put the privileged `postgres` session-pooler URL on the single line of that file (postgresql://postgres:<pwd>@aws-1-...pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres). NEVER hardcode it here; NEVER commit the bundle or the secret.
